# HYDRA(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  hydra — online password brute-forcer

## SYNOPSIS
  hydra [-l user] [-P wordlist] <target> <service>

## DESCRIPTION
Attempts brute-force login attacks against network services.
(Simulated — no actual brute force performed in tutorial)

## EXAMPLES
  hydra -l ghost -P rockyou.txt 10.0.1.100 ssh
  hydra -l admin -P passwords.txt nexus.corp http-post-form

## SEE ALSO
  john, hashcat, nc
